name: progress-reporter-kerja
description: Desktop app untuk jadwalkan progress Discord otomatis
author: hafidrf

scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron . -- --prk-dev"
scripts.setup:discord: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Copy-Item -Force scripts/discord-browser/config.example.json scripts/discord-browser/config.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -Force scripts/discord-browser/messages-pending.example.json scripts/discord-browser/messages-pending.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
